main.description: An authored story-pool item (NPC / item / lore_fragment / creature / plot_beat) — the SHARED, read-mostly content the inference-free engine dispatches from. Lives in a SERVICE repo and is the source of truth for the pool: the engine loads it with listRecords and caches it (a worker/KV cache is a disposable projection, rebuildable from this collection). The offline pregen lane WRITES these; the hot path only reads. rkey = the stable content id (e.g. 'np-keeper'). Field names mirror the engine's content_item shape so a record loads with no transform.

type.description: Which pool a feature dispatches from.

content.description: The renderable payload: {name, description, mechanics?, dialogue?}. Open-shaped (dialogue trees vary).

revelation_tier.description: Hard tier gate: a player never sees content above their revelation_tier.

tags.description: World/role tags. The role→tag bridge biases dispatch toward a resident's econ role.

requires.description: Gate blob {facts, items, min_rep} — the reactive layer. Empty/absent = always available.

status.description: Retired items stay bound to existing placements but never re-dispatch.
